heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 11297 Authorization of appropriations

(a). substituted “$49,300,000 for each of fiscal years 2024 through 2028, up to $41,500,000” for “$40,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 2014 through 2023, up to $32,200,000”.Pub. children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: To carry out the provisions of this subchapter, there are authorized to be appropriated $49,300,000 for each of fiscal years 2024 through 2028, up to $41,500,000 of which shall be used to carry out for each such fiscal year.section 11293(b) of this title

children.heading: Evaluation
children.label: b Evaluation
children.text: The Administrator may use not more than 5 percent of the amount appropriated for a fiscal year under subsection (a) to conduct an evaluation of the effectiveness of the programs and activities established and operated under this subchapter.
